'''Wrrlevgebev''' (or '''Wrrl''' to his friends) was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] who served the [[I'att Armament]] on [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] after the founders' granddaughter, [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] saved him from the beatings of a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] dealer. This earned I'att a [[Life debt/Legends|life debt]].<ref name="TOT" />

However, the debt was brief. Five years later, Wrrl would be [[Death/Legends|killed]] while protecting the girl from being taken by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] intent on taking the company's weapons knowledge.

His face was dominated by an unusual red-blond stripe and held a disdain for cowardly employees.<ref name="TOT" />

{{Char-stub}}
